import torch
from pathlib import Path

# Weighted ensemble of the two codec-augmented WavLM checkpoints.
# Epoch1 is current hidden-eval best, so give it higher weight.
items = [
    ("checkpoints/codec_epoch1.pt", 0.75),
    ("checkpoints/codec_epoch2.pt", 0.25),
]
models = []
for p, w in items:
    ck = torch.load(p, map_location="cpu")
    models.append({
        "model": ck["model"],
        "pretrained": ck.get("pretrained", "microsoft/wavlm-large"),
        "weight": float(w),
        "source": p,
    })
out = {"ensemble": models, "type": "weighted_mean_logits"}
Path("checkpoints").mkdir(exist_ok=True)
torch.save(out, "checkpoints/ensemble_codec12_w075.pt")
print("saved checkpoints/ensemble_codec12_w075.pt")
